A lawyer (Ginger Rogers) bails out and then marries a Hollywood tough guy (Jack Carson) who's a milquetoast in real life.
programme.title: The Groom Wore Spurs

programme.desc: Dorothy tries to save her dog from a storm and eases on down the road to see the Wiz with Tin Man, Scarecrow and Cowardly Lion.
programme.title: The Wiz

programme.desc: A teenager (Tuesday Weld) wants to wear a strapless gown to the prom.
programme.title: Rock, Rock, Rock!

programme.desc: A reporter writes a fictitious column about a man named John Doe, who claims to despair at America's neglect of the little people and plans to kill himself. To maintain the ruse, the newspaper hires a ballplayer-turned-hobo to pose as John Doe.
programme.title: Meet John Doe

programme.desc: A stewardess (Doris Day) runs for her life once she realizes her second husband (Louis Jourdan) killed her first.
programme.title: Julie

programme.desc: A Brooklyn bookkeeper (Don Knotts) falls off a pier, turns into a fish and helps the Navy track U-boats.
programme.title: The Incredible Mr. Limpet

programme.desc: An outlaw is left by his cohorts and girlfriend to be captured after he is wounded during a heist. When he is released from prison, he tracks his old crew to a run-down town and plays a game of cat and mouse with them.
programme.title: Gun the Man Down

programme.desc: The track star's life unfolds, as a court-ordered parole officer investigates his past.
programme.title: The Jesse Owens Story

programme.desc: Several would-be heirs are forced to spend a night in a haunted house in order to collect their inheritance.
programme.title: The Cat and the Canary

programme.desc: A detective (Peter O'Toole) helps a French art forger's daughter (Audrey Hepburn) steal a fake Venus.
programme.title: How to Steal a Million

programme.desc: Poor white tenant farmers (Zachary Scott, Betty Field, Beulah Bondi) battle fierce odds to make a living on a Texas plot.
programme.title: The Southerner

programme.desc: Mickey Spillane's private eye Mike Hammer follows bad guys and blondes to a smoking box.
programme.title: Kiss Me Deadly

programme.desc: A Los Angeles policeman (Van Heflin) has an affair and becomes obsessed with an all-night disc jockey's wife (Evelyn Keyes).
programme.title: The Prowler

programme.desc: Mickey Spillane's private eye Mike Hammer follows bad guys and blondes to a smoking box.
programme.title: Kiss Me Deadly

programme.desc: A bachelor (Jerry Lewis) agrees to baby-sit for a Hollywood star (Marilyn Maxwell), who turns out to have triplets.

programme.desc: The first manned flight to Mars is a flop, so a space official (Hal Holbrook) fakes it Hollywood-style for the public.
programme.title: Capricorn One

programme.desc: Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) and his Bar-20 buddies stop a saloon owner (Evelyn Brent) and her rustler partner (Victor Jory).
programme.title: Wide Open Town

programme.desc: A lumber tycoon (Kirk Douglas) wants the California redwoods, but a religious homesteader (Eve Miller) changes his mind.
programme.title: The Big Trees

programme.desc: An ex-convict bandit (Marlon Brando) finds the partner (Karl Malden) who betrayed him is now a town sheriff with a wife (Katy Jurado) and daughter.
programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks

programme.desc: Daily news from the State of Israel.

programme.desc: S01 E202 — The Cave of Machpelah Academy Award winner Jon Voight and his companions meet with Dr. Noam Arnon, who led the archeological team into The Cave of Machpelah in Hebron, where he discovered ancient artifacts from the age of Abraham.
programme.title: Land of Israel: God's Story

programme.desc: S01 E03 — Establishment of Beersheba Abraham, now secure in his camp, plants a shade tree and sets up a kind of roadside inn where he hosts travelers to teach them about his G-d.
programme.title: Land of Israel: God's Story

programme.desc: Over 100 years after being trapped by ice in 1915, the Ernest Shackleton expedition ship The Endurance was discovered sunken off the coast of Antarctica, with the story of Frank Hurley, the photographer on the voyage where all crew members survived.
programme.title: The Life and Work of Frank Hurley

programme.desc: Over summer break, the Davidson College Men's Basketball Team tours the Auschwitz Concentration Camp with a Holocaust survivor, Eva Kor, who with her twin sister was subjected to barbaric medical experiments by Auschwitz Dr. Josef Mengele.
programme.title: Davidson Basketball Visits Auschwitz

programme.desc: The 1972 Munich Olympics marked one of the darkest moments in Jewish athletic history when terrorists took 11 Israelis hostage. Canadian Olympic Swimmer Karen James shares her firsthand account of an Olympiad the world can never forget.
programme.title: Witness to Munich: The Karen James Story

programme.desc: Adaeze connects with her Nigerian heritage, and Lenny experiments with sweet cream and kola nut for a new customer's surprise engagement party.

programme.title: Good Morning LIVE
programme.desc: Good Morning LIVE is an engaging 30-minute program designed to inspire, inform, and connect viewers to the heart of meaningful living. Hosted by James Epperly, this dynamic show brings together a unique blend of inspirational devotions, thought-provoking interviews, and discussions on current events that matter most to you. Each episode offers uplifting messages to start your day on a positive note, insightful conversations with special guests, and a closer look at how current events align with faith and personal growth. Whether you're seeking encouragement, knowledge, or a deeper connection to today's world, Good Morning LIVE is your source for faith-filled and relevant content. Join us weekday mornings to experience a fresh perspective, inspired by truth and guided by hope.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world’s leading practicalBible teachers and New York Times bestselling author, shares encouragement andadvice to help people enjoy daily life.

programme.title: Gospel Truth with Andrew Wommack
programme.desc: Thirty-two years ago a man had an encounter with God that changed his life forever. Today, he shares that experience with thousands of people all over the world. The goal of Andrew Wommack is to reach as many people as possible with the love of God and message of grace and faith. He doesn’t measure the success of the ministry by the number of tapes distributed, books sold or offerings received. The real rewards, and proof that God is alive and working in people’s lives, are the many testimonies he receives from the people impacted by his teachings. To find out more, please visit our website at: http://www.awmi.net http://www.awmi.net/ www.awmi.net

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner is widely known for his interpretation of the Greek New Testament and his engaging teaching style. His teaching is punctuated by a unique ability to draw vividly descriptive word pictures from the Greek that illuminate the Scriptures in a fresh, new way. Rick also distinctively shares Bible principles through contemporary illustrations set against an extensive cultural and historical backdrop of New Testament times. In each episode of “Rick Renner,” Rick teaches in-depth on a passage of Scripture verse by verse, centered around a specific theme that is vitally relevant to the lives of believers who are hungry to dig deeper into the treasures of God’s Word. For more information, visit http://www.renner.org.

programme.title: Run The Streets with Debra George
programme.desc: Debra takes you to the darkest streets of America to win souls.

programme.title: The James Epperly Show
programme.desc: "The James Epperly Show" is a Christian television program that aims to inspire and uplift viewers through faith-based content. Hosted by Pastor James Epperly, the show features insightful sermons, engaging interviews with prominent Christian figures, and heartfelt testimonials from individuals who have experienced life-changing transformations through faith. Each episode is designed to offer spiritual guidance, biblical wisdom, and practical advice for living a Christ-centered life. With its friendly and welcoming vibe, 'The James Epperly Show' aims to support viewers' spiritual development and enhance their connection with God, making it a treasured part of their weekly viewing schedule.

programme.title: Manna-fest with Perry Stone

Be sure to tune in each week!

programme.title: The Mondo Show
programme.desc: The Mondo Show is real, it’s raw, with an organicfeel to the conversation. Sometimes I will be talking directly to you theaudience, and at other times I will place you in the middle of theconversation, so you can experience what is really being said. The subject matter for the conversation and thequestions will be the things people are afraid to ask, even though it is whateveryone is thinking. I want you to meet the men and women who are making adifference in our communities, in our culture, and in our lives. It’s a journeyto understand the misunderstood. It’s The Mondo Show.

programme.desc: Paula Today Paula White-Cain along with her husband, Jonathan Cain discuss real life situations and offer practical, Biblical solutions. Down-to-earth, refreshing, sometimes unfiltered and always sharing the life-changing love of Jesus thru Paula’s in-depth teaching or Jon’s anointed music. About Paula Paula White-Cain is the President of Paula White Ministries and City of Destiny headquartered in Apopka, Florida, and the spiritual advisor to President Donald Trump. She hosts Paula Today, a nationally syndicated daily broadcast reaching a potential audience of 5.7 billion people in over 200 countries. She is a leading Pastor, a renowned life coach, bestselling author, and highly sought-after motivational speaker. Paula’s commitment to humanity is felt worldwide as she reaches out through numerous charities and compassion ministries, fulfilling her mission and call to transform lives, heal hearts and win souls. She lives in the Orlando area with her husband, Jonathan Cain.

programme.title: The Counter Culture Mom Show
programme.desc: Former Hollywood actress, pop culture expert, Tina Griffin, left her Wisconsin dairy farm at the age of 20 and headed to Hollywood, CA to earn a BA in Film and Television broadcasting from California State University - Los Angeles. She’s traveled globally for the past 20 years delivering her eye-opening show, Hollywood Exposed https://counterculturemom.com/adult-session/ , explaining the real agenda behind the entertainment industry and its impact on the foundational development of today’s youth. Besides being in countless movies, Tina has worked on TV shows such as Jimmy Kimmel Live!, Young and the Restless, Days of Our Lives, Lizzie McGuire, Drake and Josh, and Malcolm in the Middle, competed in the Miss America pageant and worked at the OSCARS. She was involved with the Film Society as well as Women in Film and an active member of the Screen Actors Guild (SAG) and the American Federation of Television and Radio Artists (AFTRA). She has opened for bands such as Colton Dixon, Third Day, and Jeremy Camp. Each episode offers uplifting messages to start your day on a positive note, insightful conversations with special guests, and a closer look at how current events align with faith and personal growth. Whether you're seeking encouragement, knowledge, or a deeper connection to today's world, Good Morning LIVE is your source for faith-filled and relevant content. Join us weekday mornings to experience a fresh perspective, inspired by truth and guided by hope.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world’s leading practicalBible teachers and New York Times bestselling author, shares encouragement andadvice to help people enjoy daily life.

programme.title: Gospel Truth with Andrew Wommack
programme.desc: Thirty-two years ago a man had an encounter with God that changed his life forever. Today, he shares that experience with thousands of people all over the world. The goal of Andrew Wommack is to reach as many people as possible with the love of God and message of grace and faith. He doesn’t measure the success of the ministry by the number of tapes distributed, books sold or offerings received. The real rewards, and proof that God is alive and working in people’s lives, are the many testimonies he receives from the people impacted by his teachings. To find out more, please visit our website at: http://www.awmi.net http://www.awmi.net/ www.awmi.net

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner is widely known for his interpretation of the Greek New Testament and his engaging teaching style. His teaching is punctuated by a unique ability to draw vividly descriptive word pictures from the Greek that illuminate the Scriptures in a fresh, new way. Rick also distinctively shares Bible principles through contemporary illustrations set against an extensive cultural and historical backdrop of New Testament times. In each episode of “Rick Renner,” Rick teaches in-depth on a passage of Scripture verse by verse, centered around a specific theme that is vitally relevant to the lives of believers who are hungry to dig deeper into the treasures of God’s Word. For more information, visit http://www.renner.org.

programme.title: Concepts Of Faith with Charles Capps
programme.desc: ArkansasFarmer, Charles Capps and family discovered that the spiritual truths Jesustaught could be applied to the everyday circumstances of life and change it!The practical teaching of how to do that is needed and relevant for everyonetoday. Charles, wife Peggy and daughter Annette share life changing truths.

programme.title: Brian & Bobbie Houston - JesusFollowers.TV
programme.desc: "What greater honour and testimony is there than to be a devotedand passionate follower of the Lord Jesus Christ. Bobbie and I believe in the Church, thelocal church and the power and blessing of being planted (Psalm 92). We alsobelieve that in this day and age, God is creating multiple ways to water theseeds and greatness of calling within. Jesusfollowers.TV is here towelcome and extend our table of life and experience to you. This onlineplatform is here to love, encourage, and be a trustworthy voice of hope andinspiration in the days ahead. Our heart is to serve the God-given potentialwithin you and the Body of Christ. As Eph 2:21-22 says, we are all beingbuilt into a holy habitation for the Living God - brick by brick, stone bystone, with Jesus Christ as the Chief Cornerstone. May Jesusfollowers.TV be ablessing to you and those you care for” Brian and Bobbie Houston

programme.title: Faith & Law
programme.desc: Faith & Law is a 30 minute variety program that focuses on the intersection of faith and law.

programme.title: The James Epperly Show
programme.desc: "The James Epperly Show" is a Christian television program that aims to inspire and uplift viewers through faith-based content. Hosted by Pastor James Epperly, the show features insightful sermons, engaging interviews with prominent Christian figures, and heartfelt testimonials from individuals who have experienced life-changing transformations through faith. Each episode is designed to offer spiritual guidance, biblical wisdom, and practical advice for living a Christ-centered life. With its friendly and welcoming vibe, 'The James Epperly Show' aims to support viewers' spiritual development and enhance their connection with God, making it a treasured part of their weekly viewing schedule.

programme.title: The Jim Bakker Show
programme.desc: The Jim Bakker Show is an hour-long daily Christian broadcast that is aired throughout the United States, Canada, and the entire world through multiple broadcasts on Pioneer Network, Directv, Dish Network and other world wide satellites, and the PTL Television Network. Join Jim and Lori as they bring to the stage today’s greatest prophets, health experts, and leaders of the Christian world to discuss and understand Biblical prophecy and the Revelations of Gods Word.

programme.title: Kyle Winkler
programme.desc: Kyle Winkler is a practical Bible teacher, author of Silence Satan and Activating the Power of God’s Word, and creator of the popular Shut Up, Devil! app. Through his teachings, Kyle is known for using his own story to boast in the power of God’s Word for victorious living.

programme.title: Samuel Rodriguez
programme.desc: New Season with Pastor Sam will usher in a "New Season" where individuals and families will no longer live in failure or merely survive but they will thrive for the glory of Jesus.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Jentezen Franklin is the Senior Pastor of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church. Each week his television program, Kingdom Connection, is broadcast on major networks all over the world. A New York Times best-selling author, Jentezen has written ten books including his most recent Acres of Diamonds, Love Like You’ve Never Been Hurt, the ground-breaking Fasting and Right People-Right Place-Right Plan.

programme.title: Paula Today with Paula White-Cain
programme.desc: Paula Today Paula White-Cain along with her husband, Jonathan Cain discuss real life situations and offer practical, Biblical solutions. Down-to-earth, refreshing, sometimes unfiltered and always sharing the life-changing love of Jesus thru Paula’s in-depth teaching or Jon’s anointed music. About Paula Paula White-Cain is the President of Paula White Ministries and City of Destiny headquartered in Apopka, Florida, and the spiritual advisor to President Donald Trump. She hosts Paula Today, a nationally syndicated daily broadcast reaching a potential audience of 5.7 billion people in over 200 countries. She is a leading Pastor, a renowned life coach, bestselling author, and highly sought-after motivational speaker. Paula’s commitment to humanity is felt worldwide as she reaches out through numerous charities and compassion ministries, fulfilling her mission and call to transform lives, heal hearts and win souls. She lives in the Orlando area with her husband, Jonathan Cain.

programme.title: Manna Fest with Perry Stone
programme.desc: Manna-fest is the weekly television program of Perry Stone that deals with in-depth prophetic and practical studies of the Word of God. As biblical prophecy continues to unfold, you will find Manna-fest to be a resource to help you better understand where we are now in light of Bible prophecy and what the Bible says about the future. Be sure to tune in each week!

programme.title: The Counter Culture Mom Show
programme.desc: Former Hollywood actress, pop culture expert, Tina Griffin, left her Wisconsin dairy farm at the age of 20 and headed to Hollywood, CA to earn a BA in Film and Television broadcasting from California State University - Los Angeles. She’s traveled globally for the past 20 years delivering her eye-opening show, Hollywood Exposed https://counterculturemom.com/adult-session/ , explaining the real agenda behind the entertainment industry and its impact on the foundational development of today’s youth. Besides being in countless movies, Tina has worked on TV shows such as Jimmy Kimmel Live!, Young and the Restless, Days of Our Lives, Lizzie McGuire, Drake and Josh, and Malcolm in the Middle, competed in the Miss America pageant and worked at the OSCARS. She was involved with the Film Society as well as Women in Film and an active member of the Screen Actors Guild (SAG) and the American Federation of Television and Radio Artists (AFTRA). She has opened for bands such as Colton Dixon, Third Day, and Jeremy Camp. As host of The Counter Culture Mom Show, Tina gives the latest pop culture news and features experts covering critical topics such as cutting, suicide, bullying, online chat room d

programme.title: Bible Coaching
programme.desc: There are tens of thousands of personal development books out there, but for me, the Bible is the foundation of wisdom, strength, and direction for every chapter of life. In this episode, we explore how Scripture gives us real guidance for healing, courage, discipline, purpose, and moving forward with confidence. We reflect on Philippians chapter 3, verses 13–14, where Paul reminds us to let go of what’s behind and press forward toward what God has ahead. This is more than inspiration—it’s a powerful life strategy for anyone ready to grow, change, and step into their next chapter.

programme.title: Christian Coaching Session on New Beginnings-for-2026
programme.desc: This Christian life coaching session is rooted in biblical themes of new beginnings and God’s constant presence. The video offers calm guidance, spiritual encouragement, and practical life-coaching reflections to help you let go of the past and invite God into your everyday life. If you’re feeling stuck, tired, or uncertain about the future, this session is designed to bring reassurance, clarity, and hope — reminding you that you don’t have to walk your journey alone. Life coaching is a practical goal-setting process, and when supported by faith and spirituality, it has the power unimaginable.

programme.desc: In this Life Coaching Session we delve into the deeper currents of your being. This is an invitation into stillness, a chance to realign with your true purpose and inner wisdom. It is about understanding that you are always guided and supported, even when the path ahead seems unclear. Your spiritual journey is unique.
